No. 08 / Sinta
"Thank you for all the love."

The note left on Sinta, our Valentine's piece, after preorders sold out. FLORENO works in seasonal drops and made-to-order commissions: when a design is gone, it is gone.

Ranunculus / Garden Rose / Anthurium

"Flowers for friends and family. Fun at first. Intentional over time. Now, FLORENO."
